initial_prompt: This is a transcription of Siddharth speaking in Indian English. He is a third-year AI ML student at BNMIT Bangalore building income systems with free AI tools. Voice commands include: open Chrome, open Brave, close Spotify, play Shape of You, pause music, next track, volume up, volume down, search for, YouTube, go back, new tab, scroll down, scroll up, switch window, what time is it, set timer, note mode, new line, delete that, take a screenshot, stop Echo, clear transcript, open WhatsApp, open VS Code, open file explorer. Transcribe each command precisely.
sample_texts: Hi, I'm Siddharth. I'm a third year AI ML student at BNMIT, Bangalore. I'm building an income system using free AI tools before the recession hits. My goal is to go from zero to one lakh rupees a month. This is my real journey, my real numbers and my real mistakes.

Hi, I'm Siddharth. I'm a third-year AML student at BNMIT Bangalore. I'm building an income system using free AI tools before the recession hits. My goal is to go from zero to one lakh rupees a month. This is my real journey, my real numbers and my real honest mistakes.
